overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character exploring a neon-lit elevated walkway in a futuristic city at night. The character walks past glass railings overlooking busy streets below, stops to observe flying vehicles and towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, then continues along the reflective walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings overlooking multi-level city streets

events.description: pedestrian in tank top passes close to camera, temporarily filling the frame
camera turns slightly to look down at street level traffic below

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated walkway, glancing at the futuristic architecture and street traffic below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in tank top and khaki pants walking toward camera
pedestrian standing at glass railing looking down at the street

entered.detail: transparent glass safety railing with metal posts lining the walkway edge
tall building with grid of cyan neon-lit windows and futuristic facade
wet polished surface mirroring the neon lights and building facades above
angular white architectural structure with illuminated cyan edges
interior shopping levels visible through glass walls with warm lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a walk along an elevated pedestrian walkway in a neon-drenched cyberpunk city. Glass railings line the path overlooking busy streets below, while futuristic buildings with cyan neon lights tower overhead. The reflective floor mirrors the vibrant city lights as the character passes other pedestrians and glances down at the dense traffic flowing through the multi-level urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated plaza with panoramic view of skyscrapers and aerial traffic

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on towering skyscrapers with holographic billboards
flying vehicles pass overhead between the skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: standing still at the railing, looking up at the towering architecture and flying vehicles overhead

notable_agents.action: flying car with illuminated thrusters hovering between buildings

entered.detail: massive vertical holographic advertisement displaying FUYA CIRCUS with red and blue graphics
futuristic aerial vehicle with glowing lights flying between skyscrapers
multi-level road structure with streams of traffic visible below the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character stops at an open plaza section of the walkway to observe the breathtaking cityscape. The camera pans upward to reveal massive skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements, including a prominent FUYA CIRCUS billboard. Flying vehicles navigate between the towers while traffic flows on the elevated highways below, all illuminated by the pervasive cyan and blue neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated walkway with commercial vending and digital displays

events.description: character resumes walking along the elevated pathway

agents.ego_description: walking along the pathway passing by illuminated vending machines and wall-mounted screens

entered.detail: illuminated beverage dispenser with COLA branding and glowing selection buttons
large wall-mounted display showing advertisements with white text

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the covered section of the elevated walkway, passing by a glowing vending machine and digital billboards mounted on the walls. The glass railing now runs along the right side as the path curves, with the elevated highway and city traffic visible to the left. The reflective floor continues to mirror the neon ambiance of the surrounding cyberpunk architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a neon-drenched elevated walkway that transitions from a bustling pedestrian path to a wide urban vista before returning to a sheltered corridor. It begins with a walk past glass railings overlooking a dense urban canyon, where the reflective floor mirrors the cyan lights of towering buildings and the flow of traffic below. As the character reaches an open plaza, the camera pans upward to reveal a breathtaking cityscape of massive skyscrapers and flying vehicles, highlighted by a prominent FUYA CIRCUS holographic billboard. The scene then shifts back to a forward motion as the character enters a covered section of the walkway, passing glowing vending machines and digital billboards. Finally, the path curves to keep the elevated highway in view to the left while the reflective surfaces continue to capture the pervasive blue and cyan ambiance of the cyberpunk architecture.
